steps.t: Irsinith enlists you to gain Viznak's aid in learning more about the missing section of the map. Return to him at Sul Madásh.
Viznak directs you to scour the area in the south-east section of Adagím in search for something out of the ordinary. He believes that you will find a…
You discovered a mushroom at the foot of the mountains in south-eastern Adagím. The mushroom was certainly different and out of place from the rest. R…
